reasoning: The analysis focused on the .text section, identifying the main function entry and several subroutines based on standard assembly patterns (prologues/epilogues).
Basic blocks were identified by following sequential instruction flow and identifying control-flow instructions like 'jmp', 'call', 'ret', and 'je/jne' conditionals.
Function boundary identification was based on 'endbr64', 'push rbp', 'mov rbp, rsp' patterns and return instructions.
Multiple subroutines (sub_2390, sub_2430, sub_2470, sub_2480, sub_27b0, sub_2a80, sub_2ac0, sub_2ae0, sub_2bd0, sub_2c90, sub_2cd0, sub_2d20, sub_2d70, sub_2e20) were identified.
Some edges involving plt calls were omitted or simplified to comply with intraprocedural requirements and the complexity of the PLT/GOT mechanism.
